name: Abhishek Kumar Singh
title: Technical Lead
tagline: Full-Stack Engineer · React · Spring Boot · Mobile
introduction: Technical lead and full-stack engineer with 13+ years building high-performance web and mobile products. At Personatech, I own spec-driven, end-to-end feature delivery — from design mockups through React frontend, Spring Boot backend, and production — using agentic AI workflows and Speckit to streamline design-to-deploy cycles. Previously built fintech mobile apps at scale (InstaReM/Nium). Side project: FitBuddy, a fitness app with on-device ML and LLM-powered coaching.

skills.heading: Frontend
skills.value: React, TypeScript, JavaScript, React Router, HTML5, CSS3

skills.heading: Testing & Quality
skills.value: React Testing Library, Playwright, Jest, unit & integration testing

skills.heading: Architecture
skills.value: SPAs, SSR/PWA, component libraries, performance optimization

skills.heading: Delivery & AI
skills.value: Spec-driven development, Speckit, agentic AI workflows, technical mentoring

experience.subtitle: AI event-tech SaaS platform powering revenue-generating networking programs for global enterprise events
experience.roleLine: Technical Lead (Apr 2023 – Present) · Senior Software Engineer (Mar 2020 – Apr 2023)
highlights: Own end-to-end full-stack feature delivery using spec-driven development — from design mockups through React UI, Spring Boot APIs, testing, and production release.
Built a seamless design-to-production workflow combining agentic AI tooling and Speckit.
Ship full-stack features independently; translate product specs and Figma designs into production-ready, tested code.
Maintain shared UI component architecture and frontend quality standards with React Testing Library and Playwright.
Built and maintained InstaReM cross-border payments mobile app in React Native (iOS & Android).
Integrated PhonePe Switch micro app; implemented security hardening for sensitive financial flows.
Owned App Store and Play Store release cycles for InstaReM and Amaze card app.
Developed Smaken food-ordering SPA (React, React Router) for the Netherlands market.
Improved page speed via lazy loading and bundle optimization.
Built Immidi marketing dashboard in React and brand client apps in React Native.
Contributed to Node.js/Koa APIs and mobile app store deployments.
Shipped Bluff Party multiplayer card game (Unity3D) and browser-based poker games.
Published Legendary Strike HTML5 arcade game to the iOS App Store.

hobby.description: Full-stack fitness platform with on-device ML pose detection, Supabase backend, and LLM-powered workout form and meal analysis. React creator web app for plan management.
